President Donald Trump holds his 9th cabinet meeting at the White House.

byIowa's News Now Staff

CEDAR RAPIDS, Iowa —Happening on Friday from 6 a.m. until noon, Dunkin’ locations across Iowa will host the annual "Cop on a Rooftop" event, partnering with the Law Enforcement Torch Run forSpecial Olympics Iowa.

During the event, law enforcement officers will be stationed on Dunkin’ rooftops to raise money for Special Olympics athletes in Iowa.

Guests visiting participating Dunkin’ stores can support the cause by making a donation.

In return, those who contribute will receive special treats as a thank you. Anyone who donates will get a coupon for a free doughnut, while those who donate $10 or more will receive a coupon for a free medium hot or iced coffee.

The funds raised will go directly toward programming for Special Olympics Iowa, helping to provide training and competition opportunities for athletes across the state.

To see which Dunkin' locations areparticipating click here

title: Funds raised from Cop on a Rooftop event to enhance Special Olympics Iowa programs
